name: Zhewen Interactive Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhewen Interactive Group Co., Ltd. engages in the infrastructure construction, financial service, digital marketing, real estate development, and semiconductor businesses in China. The company invests in, constructs, manages, and operates various infrastructure projects. It offers general contracting services for municipal utilities and highway projects; water conservancy and hydroplant projects; railway engineering projects; bridge, road base, and pavement engineering projects; landscaping projects; transportation safety facilities; and power and electromechanical engineering projects. The company also provides financial support services, such as microcredit, finance lease, industrial fund, commercial banking, trade finance, etc. for companies; and operates nine digital marketing brands that offer brand management, creative planning, online marketing, offline implementation, advertising agency, online promotion, and other services. In addition, it develops various real estate projects in Dongying, Qingdao, Yantai, and Binzhou; and imports and exports various kinds of bulk stocks. Further, the company researches, develops, produces, and sells power semiconductor devices, chips, and modules, including IGBT, FRD, and MOSFET that are used in induction cookers, small power frequency converters, inverter welding machines, brushless motor controls, UPS, and other products. Additionally, it produces acrylamide, a biochemical using the microbiological method. The company was formerly known as Keda Group Co., Ltd. Zhewen Interactive Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Dongying, China.
